creator: freebsd-2024@virtual-estates.net
text:
Created attachment 150443
Patch Makefile to required and use critcl to compile tcllib's C-code

Currently the port installs only the pure-Tcl implementations of the modules. That's a shame, because a number of modules provide C-implementations, which are orders of magnitude faster.

The attachments take care of this problem as well as pick a couple of other nits.
